Order Online

Order Online

Get Rollz delivered to your door or order ahead for pickup. We’re available on Uber Eats and SkipTheDishes.

Order on Uber Eats Order on SkipTheDishes

Delivery & Pickup

Both platforms offer delivery and pickup options:

  1. Browse our menu on Uber Eats or SkipTheDishes
  2. Choose delivery to your door or pickup at our location
  3. Enjoy freshly made rolled ice cream

📍 Pickup Location: 2685 Main St, Vancouver, BC V5Y 2R5 🕐 Hours: Mon–Sun, 3 PM – 10 PM

Of course, you’re always welcome to walk in — no order needed.

Questions? Contact us or call +1-604-283-4263.

Rollz Ice Cream Vancouver

  • Rollz Vancouver
  • info@rollzyvr.com

    Vancouver's freshly rolled ice cream destination. Handcrafted Thai-style rolled ice cream, waffles, milkshakes & faloodas at 2685 Main St. Order delivery or pickup on Uber Eats and SkipTheDishes. Explore 50+ flavors.
